prompts:
A small chibi male figure stands frozen mid-step, arms slightly raised, eyes wide with alarm, as a dramatic downward arrow made of dark ink lines plunges from the sky directly toward him. Setting: a dimly lit stone alchemist's laboratory, cluttered shelves of vials in the background, single candle casting long shadows. Key visual detail: a glowing amber vial labeled with a molecular symbol tumbles off a shelf in slow motion.

Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: slate grey, deep amber, earthy brown. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm amber glow on the falling vial. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A chibi scientist figure in a worn leather apron peers through a magnifying glass at a tiny glowing mineral crystal held in tweezers. The crystal pulses with faint golden light. Setting: a cozy workshop table covered in open books and hand-drawn anatomical charts, warm candlelight. Key visual detail: a detailed diagram pinned to the wall behind showing a chain reaction — mineral → enzyme → hormone — drawn in ink.

Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: warm gold, parchment beige, forest green. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm amber glow on the mineral crystal. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A chibi male figure sits slumped in an old wooden armchair, elbows on knees, staring blankly at the floor. His eyes are heavy-lidded and dull. Setting: a grey-toned home interior at dusk, a single window with fading light, dust motes visible in the air. Key visual detail: a cracked hourglass on the table beside him, sand stopped mid-fall.

Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: cold grey, dusty blue, muted olive. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. No warm accents — intentionally flat and heavy. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A chibi alchemist figure holds up a small glowing amber capsule between two fingers, eyes wide with quiet confidence, a subtle smile. Behind them a large illustrated enzyme-chain diagram on the wall glows faintly. Setting: a warm stone laboratory, firelight from a hearth casting a golden glow across the room. Key visual detail: golden light radiates softly from the capsule, illuminating the character's face and the molecular diagram on the wall.

Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: warm amber, deep forest green, earthy brown. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm amber glow emanating from the capsule. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A chibi figure stands at a rustic wooden kitchen counter, carefully measuring small amber capsules into a hand, with a glass of water beside them. The scene is evening: warm candlelight, no calcium-rich food visible nearby. Key visual detail: a small illustrated clock on the wall shows evening time, and a bowl of nuts (zinc-rich food) sits on a shelf in the background.

Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: warm amber, slate grey, deep brown. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm glow on the capsules. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A cheerful chibi character leans forward from behind a large open book, waving directly toward the viewer with a warm, inviting smile. The book is illustrated with botanical and molecular sketches. Setting: a cozy candlelit study, bookshelves packed with volumes in the background, warm amber light. Key visual detail: a small faktini-style magnifying glass icon resting on the open book, glowing gently.

Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: warm amber, parchment beige, forest green. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm glow on the book and magnifying glass. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.
